# metalcloud_storage_pool (Data Source)

Storage pool data source. Looks up a storage pool (storage) filtered by site and, optionally, technology.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String) Id of the site the storage pool belongs to

### Optional

- `name` (String) Name of the storage pool to filter by
- `technology` (String) Storage technology to filter by (e.g. iscsi, fc, nvme)

### Read-Only

- `storage_pool_id` (String) Storage pool Id
